description_long: This object consists of two large, rectangular teal cushions paired with two smaller, square accent cushions featuring a geometric pattern in shades of teal, gray, and white. The larger cushions have a subtle ribbed texture, giving them a modern and slightly structured appearance. The accent cushions display a bold, repeating triangular motif that adds visual interest and contrast to the set. The cushions appear plush and well-stuffed, suggesting comfort and support for seating or lounging. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a coordinated color palette. These cushions would be suitable for outdoor benches, park seating, or modern urban lounge areas.
description: A set of two teal ribbed cushions with two smaller geometric-patterned accent cushions, plush and modern in design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both teal cushions and the geometric accent cushions clearly, highlighting their textures and patterns.
description_view_1: Side-angled view emphasizing the depth and thickness of the cushions, with the accent cushions partially overlapping the larger ones.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the base of the teal cushions and their overall thickness, with minimal visibility of the accent cushions' patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again showing the layered arrangement and the geometric design on the accent cushions.
attribute_location: public park bench or urban outdoor lounge area
attribute_placement: arranged side by side on a bench or outdoor seating, with accent cushions placed in front of larger back cushions
